response.justification: The candidate meets the baseline 15-year experience requirement and demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals across multiple domains. Current exposure to AI-agent infrastructure tooling at re:cinq is relevant, but the resume lacks evidence of specialized AI expertise, cloud platform strategy knowledge, or demonstrated AI products—core requirements for this Director-level AI strategy role. Warrants a conversation to assess depth of AI knowledge, but a significant expertise gap is apparent.
strengths: 17+ years of continuous software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded systems, and infrastructure
Recent involvement with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling frameworks at current employer
Demonstrated technical leadership, mentoring capability, and ability to communicate complex concepts through workshops and talks
concerns: No demonstrated expertise in AI/ML or evidence of building AI-powered products or platforms
No advanced degree in AI, machine learning, or related fields despite stated preference
No clear background in cloud platform strategy or enterprise cloud technology advisory roles

key_factors.factor: Missing AI specialization and demonstrated AI products
Recent AI tooling and infrastructure exposure
